columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The date and time of the DNS event, expressed as a UTC-formatted string.

columns.name: MostGranularIdentity
columns.description: The first identity matched with this request in order of granularity.

columns.name: Identities
columns.description: All identities associated with this request.

columns.name: InternalIp
columns.description: The internal IP address that made the request.

columns.name: ExternalIp
columns.description: The external IP address that made the request.

columns.name: Action
columns.description: Whether the request was allowed or blocked.

columns.name: QueryType
columns.description: The type of DNS request that was made.

columns.name: ResponseCode
columns.description: The DNS return code for this request.

columns.name: Categories
columns.description: The security or content categories that the destination matches.

columns.name: MostGranularIdentityType
columns.description: The first identity type matched with this request in order of granularity.

columns.name: IdentityTypes
columns.description: The type of identity that made the request, for example: Roaming Computer, Network.

columns.name: BlockedCategories
columns.description: The categories that resulted in the destination being blocked.

columns.name: RuleId
columns.description: The ID of the access rule when the DNS request is matched by a policy.

columns.name: DestinationCountries
columns.description: The two-character country identifier of the domain that was requested.
